en: Alright, so I'm back in high school.
I'm standing in the middle of the cafeteria.
I realize I was totally naked.
zh: 我突然意识到自己完全没穿衣服。

en: Oh, yeah. I've had that dream.
Then I look down and I realize there's a phone there.
zh: 然后我低头一看，发现那儿有一部电话。

en: All of a sudden, the phone starts to ring.
zh: 突然之间，电话开始响了。

en: And it turns out it's my mother.
zh: 结果发现是我妈妈打来的。

en: Which is very, very weird because...
